words.definition: Any form of water — rain, snow, sleet or hail — that falls from clouds to the ground.

words.definition: A pair of values, usually latitude and longitude, that pinpoint a location.

words.definition: Knives, forks and spoons used for eating and serving food.

quiz.question: Which word means: "The people who attend or watch a performance or broadcast."?
quiz.explanation: Audience (noun) — The people who attend or watch a performance or broadcast.

quiz.question: Which word means: "The customers or clients of a business collectively."?
quiz.explanation: Clientele (noun) — The customers or clients of a business collectively.

quiz.question: Which word means: "People of noble rank or birth as a class; the aristocracy."?
quiz.explanation: Nobility (noun) — People of noble rank or birth as a class; the aristocracy.

quiz.question: Which word means: "The body of ordained religious ministers considered as a group."?
quiz.explanation: Clergy (noun) — The body of ordained religious ministers considered as a group.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A military force raised from the civilian population to supplement a regular army."?
quiz.explanation: Militia (noun) — A military force raised from the civilian population to supplement a regular army.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Large-calibre guns used in warfare on land."?
quiz.explanation: Artillery (noun) — Large-calibre guns used in warfare on land.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Bullets, shells and other projectiles used with firearms."?
quiz.explanation: Ammunition (noun) — Bullets, shells and other projectiles used with firearms.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Military weapons, ammunition and equipment collectively."?
quiz.explanation: Munitions (noun) — Military weapons, ammunition and equipment collectively.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Weapons of all kinds considered as a group."?
quiz.explanation: Weaponry (noun) — Weapons of all kinds considered as a group.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Soldiers who fight on horseback (historically) or in armoured vehicles."?
quiz.explanation: Cavalry (noun) — Soldiers who fight on horseback (historically) or in armoured vehicles.

quiz.question: Which word means: "Soldiers who fight on foot."?
quiz.explanation: Infantry (noun) — Soldiers who fight on foot.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A group of ships sailing together or under one command."?
quiz.explanation: Fleet (noun) — A group of ships sailing together or under one command.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A principal division of an air force or a naval unit."?
quiz.explanation: Squadron (noun) — A principal division of an air force or a naval unit.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A group of stars forming a recognisable pattern in the sky."?
quiz.explanation: Constellation (noun) — A group of stars forming a recognisable pattern in the sky.
